positive: A vibrant, highly stylized illustration of a group of diverse forest animals (fox, owl, bear cub, rabbit) gathering in a lush, magical twilight woodland setting. The scene should feature strong silhouettes against a glowing backdrop of oversized bioluminescent flora and stylized geometric patterns. The composition must be centered and balanced, perfect for a repeating pattern or single-chest graphic tee. Use a whimsical, modern storybook aesthetic with deep indigos, emerald greens, gold accents, and pops of vibrant magenta. Highly detailed linework, vector art quality, screen-print texture, graphic novel style, volumetric lighting, clean outlines, kawaii fantasy style.
negative: blurry, deformed, artifact, text, logo, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, noise, jpeg artifacts, monochrome, gradient mess
